name: AVATAR: Frontiers of Pandora
description:
With this bot, you will be able to rp into the area of Western Frontier at Pandora.

Like in the game, you are gonna take the role of the Sarentu.

.

Please note that I haven't been able to play the game yet so some things may be off. Suggestions about things I could fix are always welcome :)

.

Information included:

• All characters including the Protagonist

• Basic AVATAR lore

• English-na'vi dictionary

• Clan descriptions

• Locations

•Fauna

•Flora

•Lore

•Food/Meals

•Biomes

.

■ AVATAR: Frontiers of Pandora RP | AVATAR: Frontiers of Pandora RPG | AVATAR: FoP RP | AVATAR: FoP RPG ■
